name: nop-metadata
description: Nop Metadata: federated metadata catalog, ORM model import, BI semantic layer, data lineage, and quality management

commands.test: mvn test -pl nop-metadata/nop-metadata-service -am -q 2>/dev/null || echo 'no tests configured yet'
commands.build: mvn compile -pl nop-metadata -am -q 2>/dev/null || echo 'no build configured yet'
